export_config.applied_to_session: Applied to current session (no file path configured).
export_config.header:
設定匯入/匯出操作的自訂副檔名和命名範本。

變更將儲存至應用程式設定，並套用於所有後續匯入/匯出對話方塊。
export_config.help_extensions_info:
Extensions must start with a dot (e.g. ".nmsship"). These are used for Save/Open file dialogs alongside standard .json and all-files filters.

The naming template is combined with the extension to produce the default filename shown in export dialogs. Invalid filename characters are automatically removed.
export_config.help_var_type: {type} – Type display name (ship type, frigate type, etc.)
export_config.reset_confirm: Reset all export settings to defaults?
export_config.reset_done: Reset to defaults. Click Save to persist.

export_config.status_reset: 已重設為預設值。點擊儲存以持久化。
export_config.title: 匯出設定
